name: instagram-automation
description: Automate Instagram tasks via Rube MCP (Composio): create posts, carousels, manage media, get insights, and publishing limits. Always search tools first for current schemas.
capabilities: Create and publish single image or video posts to Instagram Business accounts
Build and publish carousel posts with 2-10 media items
Retrieve post-level and account-level analytics insights
Monitor publishing limits and quota availability
Fetch media comments and carousel child items
Check media container processing status before publishing
author: sickn33
securitySummary: Static analyzer flagged 43 external_commands patterns and 1 network URL, but all are false positives. The skill contains only documentation (SKILL.md) with markdown-formatted tool names, not executable code. Network access via Rube MCP endpoint is legitimate for Instagram API operations. Requires user OAuth connection. No confirmed security threats found.
valueStatement: Managing Instagram content and tracking performance requires repetitive manual work. This skill automates posting, carousel creation, and insights retrieval through Rube MCP integration.
limitations: Requires Instagram Business or Creator account; personal accounts are not supported
Media URLs must be publicly accessible; private or authenticated URLs will fail
Limited to 25 posts per 24-hour rolling window enforced by Instagram
Insights data may have up to 48 hours delay from Instagram API

useCases.targetUser: Social media managers handling multiple brand accounts
useCases.title: Social Media Manager
useCases.description: Schedule and publish daily content, create product showcase carousels, and track engagement metrics without manual Instagram app usage

useCases.targetUser: Independent creators and influencers managing their own accounts
useCases.title: Content Creator
useCases.description: Automate posting workflow from content library, monitor post performance, and respond to engagement trends efficiently

useCases.targetUser: Marketing teams analyzing social media ROI and content effectiveness
useCases.title: Marketing Analyst
useCases.description: Extract post insights programmatically, compare performance across content types, and generate reports on engagement patterns

promptTemplates.title: Beginner: Post a Single Image
promptTemplates.prompt: Post this image to my Instagram with the caption 'Excited to share our latest update! #newproduct #launch'. Image URL: https://example.com/image.jpg

promptTemplates.title: Intermediate: Create a Product Carousel
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a carousel post showcasing our new collection. Use these 5 images in order: [URL1, URL2, URL3, URL4, URL5]. Caption: 'New arrivals are here! Swipe to see all styles. Shop now via link in bio. #newcollection #fashion'

promptTemplates.title: Advanced: Weekly Performance Report
promptTemplates.prompt: Get all my media from the past week and retrieve insights for each post. Include metrics for impressions, reach, engagement, and saves. Summarize which posts performed best and identify patterns in top-performing content.
promptTemplates.scenario: Analytics retrieval and analysis for performance review

promptTemplates.title: Expert: Bulk Posting with Limit Check
promptTemplates.prompt: Check my remaining publishing quota for the next 24 hours. If I have at least 3 posts available, publish these three product announcements in sequence with 30-minute intervals between each. Verify each post status before proceeding to the next.
promptTemplates.scenario: Multi-post workflow with quota validation and status polling

bestPractices: Always call RUBE_SEARCH_TOOLS first to get current tool schemas before executing workflows
Verify media container status is FINISHED before publishing, especially for video content
Check publishing limits before bulk operations to avoid hitting the 25-post daily quota
antiPatterns: Do not use private or authenticated media URLs; they must be publicly accessible
Avoid attempting to publish before container processing completes; poll status first
Do not exceed Instagram rate limits; implement exponential backoff for 429 responses

faq.question: What type of Instagram account do I need?
faq.answer: You need an Instagram Business or Creator account. Personal accounts cannot use the Instagram Graph API required for automation.

faq.question: How do I connect my Instagram account?
faq.answer: Use RUBE_MANAGE_CONNECTIONS with toolkit 'instagram'. If not connected, follow the OAuth link to authorize. Confirm status shows ACTIVE before running workflows.

faq.question: Why are my video posts failing?
faq.answer: Video containers require processing time. Always poll INSTAGRAM_GET_POST_STATUS until status is FINISHED before attempting to publish.

faq.question: Can I post to personal Instagram accounts?
faq.answer: No. The Instagram Graph API only supports Business and Creator accounts. Personal accounts must be converted to a Creator account (free) to use this skill.

faq.question: What happens if I exceed the posting limit?
faq.answer: Instagram enforces 25 posts per 24-hour rolling window. Exceeding this limit returns an error. Use INSTAGRAM_GET_IG_USER_CONTENT_PUBLISHING_LIMIT to check quota before bulk posting.

faq.question: Why are my insights showing old data?
faq.answer: Instagram API insights can have up to 48 hours delay. Recent posts may not show complete metrics immediately.
